---
title: "Junpei Suzuki | 鈴木淳平"
subtitle: "PhD in Political Science"
image: figs/portrait_ghibli_closeup.png
about: 
  template: solana
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: email
      href: mailto:jsuzuki@komazawa-u.ac.jp
    - icon: person-circle
      text: researchmap
      href: https://researchmap.jp/junpeisuzuki-ps
    - icon: mortarboard-fill
      text: ResearchGate
      href: https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Junpei-Suzuki-2
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/junpei-suzuki
---

<!-- Junpei Suzuki is a Junior Associate Professor of Political Science at the Faculty of Law, Komazawa University. He earned a PhD in political science from Waseda University in 2024. Prior to joining Komazawa, he served as a Research Associate at the Faculty of Political Science and Economics, Waseda University, and a JSPS Postdoctoral Fellow at the Institute of Social Science, the University of Tokyo. He is currently working on political ideology/partisan politics in the developed world, focusing on fiscal policy, military/national defence, environmental protection, and so on. His works have been published in *the Annuals of the Japanese Political Science Association* and *Acta Politica.* -->

::: {.panel-tabset}
### English

Junpei Suzuki is a Junior Associate Professor of Political Science at the Faculty of Law, Komazawa University. He earned a PhD in political science from Waseda University in 2024. Prior to joining Komazawa, he served as a Research Associate at the Faculty of Political Science and Economics, Waseda University, and a JSPS Postdoctoral Fellow at the Institute of Social Science, the University of Tokyo. His primary research interest lies in comparative political economy, particularly partisan politics and public opinion in advanced democracies such as Europe and Japan. He is currently working on research projects on environmental policy, defence spending, fiscal policy, welfare, and so on.

### 日本語

駒澤大学法学部政治学科講師（専任）。早稲田大学政治経済学術院助手、東京大学社会科学研究所特任研究員（日本学術振興会特別研究員PD）を経て現職。2024年に早稲田大学より博士（政治学）取得。専門は比較政治経済学、特に欧州や日本などの先進国における党派政治と世論。現在は環境保護、防衛費、財政政策、福祉などをテーマに研究中。

:::


:::{.callout-note}
### News | ニュース

::: {.panel-tabset}
#### English

- **3 April 2026:** Updated the teaching page.

- **1 April 2026:** This website has been updated completely, following my arrival at Komazawa University.

#### 日本語

- **2026年4月1日：** Teachingページを更新しました。

- **2026年4月1日：**駒澤大学着任に伴い、ホームページを全面的に改訂しました。

:::
:::

:::{.callout-warning}
### ご案内
こちらは駒澤大学法学部講師の鈴木淳平のホームページです。授業関係以外は英語が多くなっていますので、ご了承ください。

- [CV](cv/cv.qmd): 鈴木の履歴書です。

- [Research](research/research.qmd): 進行中およびこれまでの研究の一覧です。

- [Teaching](teaching/teaching.qmd): 担当授業の一覧です。

<!-- - [Seminar](seminar/seminar.qmd): 実証社会科学演習（鈴木ゼミ）の案内です。 -->
:::
